text:
There was a little old girl named Mabel. She had no friends. Just one lonely teddy bear named Teddy. She rarely left her house. Once on Halloween, she wore a witches hat and a big scary cloak. Teddy loved it.

One day a beautiful old woman named Martha visited Mabel. She sat on the bench across from Mabel. Martha had shiny copper curls and wore a tiny gold necklace that winked at Mabel.

"Hello little girl," Martha said.

Mabel looked up from her book. "Hi."

"What brings you here?"

"I didn't mean to trespass."

"Well," Martha chuckled. "You've trespassed quite happily."

"Mmmm."

"If you talk nicely to me, I'll tell you about something magical."

"What kind of thing?"

"Something good."

Mabel thought for a moment. "I just bought some beautiful flowers. My mom says I should plant them."

Martha smiled. "Plant them?"

"Maybe. Would you like them?"
